data.title: Build fractal animation for OriginStory section — single apartment dinner fractalizes into neighborhood campus

data.body: Vision: The original painterly gathering image (hero-bg.png) fractalizes outward — splitting and branching into the different events, sections, and spaces of the whole neighborhood campus. One dinner becomes many scenes: bootcamp, university, Merlin's Place, events, etc. A bunch of scenes forming simultaneously, like a fractal pattern expanding. Could be a WebGL/Three.js animation or a pre-rendered video triggered on scroll in the OriginStory section.
